Text[0]: The second time this is that I have the privilege of coming to Eorzea. Like the previous time, my fellows and I have prepared various attractions to make this a Heavensturn celebration to remember. We pray you enjoy yourself!

For helping to make the procession─and indeed the entire Heavensturn celebration─a resounding success, I offer you my heartfelt thanks once more. May you and the unicolt have many a wonderful journey together!
We have the honor of participating in this Heavensturn celebration as representatives of Camp Dragonhead.
Text[1]: During a previous event, our commander returned with the selfsame helm as this, and it quickly became a favorite among our garrison. Very dashing, would you not agree?

Text[0]: Lest you wonder, 'twas House Fortemps that petitioned the Holy See to provide the Far Eastern delegation with the unicolt─a testament to the import we place in the bonds of friendship.
Text[1]: The negotiations were something of a trial, but we are proud to have contributed to the festivities, and I couldn't be gladder to see the shy little one find its feet out in the world.

Text[0]: In the Far East, the unicorn is held to be an exalted beast that appears before pure-hearted rulers, and discerns good and evil.
Text[1]: That it should bear a resemblance to the unicorn of Eorzea is fascinating indeed. It may well be that our lands once shared a connection in the past!

Text[0]: This outfit is simply lovely, wouldn't you agree? Well, you're in luck─we're giving it to those who help bake and decorate the cakes, as a way of expressing our thanks.
Text[1]: The cake recipes were developed in collaboration with the master pâtissiers who bake cakes for Ceremonies of Eternal Bonding.
Text[2]: We made sure to come up with lots of different flavors, to suit everyone's tastes. Which is your favorite, I wonder?

Text[0]: The inspiration for these cakes came to me during Lisette's Ceremony of Eternal Bonding.
Text[1]: When Lisette and Hortefense shared the first bite of cake, their love for one another was truly radiant! And when that same cake was served to the guests, it was as though that love was shared with us all.
Text[2]: I thought it would be wonderful if we could create an opportunity for people to likewise give shape to their affection...which led me to the idea of an extra-large, extra-loving cake! Won't you have a slice, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>?

Text[0]: The guests are positively brimming with ardor and affection, kupo! Truly, Valentione's Day is a most wonderful time.
Text[1]: Should you be inspired to assist with the decoration of further cakes, I will gladly lend my aid!

Text[0]: Kupopo! Oh, such wonderful, delicious cakes!
Text[1]: And when I see everyone enjoying the fruits of my labor─quite literally, kupo─I feel such a warm, fluffy feeling in my pom!

Text[0]: Baking for another has always brought me joy, but I must say, it's rather nice to be on the receiving end too!
Text[1]: And so cake becomes a gift of love─one that bears Astrid's feelings to many, many more! How blessed I am to be part of Lady Valentione's legacy.

Text[0]: Even the way Lisette eats cake is simply adorable, wouldn't you agree? Oh, I'm the happiest man alive!
Text[1]: It may come as a surprise, but Astrid was slow to warm to me when first I sought Lisette's hand.
Text[2]: For her to now consider me a member of the family─someone with whom she can share such joyous moments─is an honor beyond words.

Text[0]: Come one, come all! Taste sweetest love, baked in the fiery ovens of passion!
Ladies and gentlemen, you are cordially invited to sample our artfully crafted confection. If cake be the food of love, eat on!
<Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>, what a pleasant surprise! Though, bein' an artisan from beyond the salt, I suppose it ain't such a surprise to find you on familiar ground.
Text[1]: Ropli asked us to visit other lands to learn what we could. After callin' in the Yok Huy and Alexandrians for the Wachumeqimeqi Appreciation Sale, he has his eye on attractin' stallholders from other lands as his next enterprise.
Text[2]: Seems his desire to connect disparate peoples through commerce ain't so easily sated! Before we left, I could've sworn I heard him mutterin' somethin' about gatherin' beads the world over...

Text[0]: Oh, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>! To think I should meet you here, in the land where you learned your trade... Why, I daresay my visit is now truly complete!
Text[1]: Exposure to other cultures is a truly valuable experience for any artisan. And what luck that our visit should coincide with a local festival!
Text[2]: The decorations, the design─all artfully evoking a celebration of love! And the attention to detail on the cake decorations... Oh, it's simply exquisite!

Text[0]: What a simply wonderful array of cakes. While chocolate has come to be enjoyed as a sweet treat in Tuliyollal of late, I can't say I've seen it used quite like this before.
Text[1]: Though, now that I think of it, chocolate may be an ideal gift to demonstrate love and care. It has long been said to be beneficial for one's spirits and physical health alike.
Text[2]: Perhaps I should consider keeping some in stock for the discerning client. After all, who's to say that medicine more pleasing to the eye and palate is any less effective?

Text[0]: Though Ropli saw to the arrangements for our travel, I was somewhat uneasy at the idea of Shunye journeying unattended. So I thought to accompany him as both guard and guide.
Text[1]: In my past travels, I encountered a Gridanian festival once before. As I recall, enormous eggs loomed large throughout the city. I remember being awed by the sheer scale of celebrations.
Text[2]: I'm afraid I was so preoccupied with preparations for our journey that I failed to heed the explanation of the festival we're currently observing. A celebration of desserts, I take it? Regardless, I shan't complain when served such delicious cake!

Text[0]: In order to undertake the quest “The Icing on the Cake,” you must first complete the quest “It's Probably Pirates.”
Hmm, what to do...
Apologies, we are still readying the store. Thank you for your patience.
I never would have guessed that my dream was actually symbolizing discovery and hope! Thanks to your efforts, now all may enjoy the festivities of Hatching–tide.
You did a marvelous job trimming down those leafkin. Thank you, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>!
Oh! Fancy meeting you here. Finding many eggs?
Text[1]: We're here as envoys. The Elder Seedseer suggested we take part in these festivities when we had a moment, and I'm glad we did!
Text[2]: I'm going to collect as many of these amazing eggs as I can, and take them home as presents for Koana and Gulool Ja!

Text[0]: <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>! I never thought I'd be speaking with you in Eorzea...
Text[1]: Alphinaud and the others have spoken with such love for these lands that I longed to see them for myself. I hope we may come to forge a lasting friendship.
Text[2]: Everyone here is so kind. In fact, I was gifted this outfit by a lady named Jihli. <chuckle> Do you think people back home would be surprised to find me dressed so?

Text[0]: <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>! I had hoped I might run into you. I bet you're surprised to see me here of all places!
Text[1]: Given the changes happening for the Arcadion, I thought I should broaden my horizons beyond the dome. A festival like this, where everyone can participate, is giving me ideas...
Text[2]: Anyway, stop by the gym the next time you're in Alexandria. We're always happy to see you!

Text[0]: I'm so used to the construction of Solution Nine that these verdant environs are peculiar to behold. The egg hunt was great fun as well.
Text[1]: At least, it was until my sisters and I all laid claim to the same egg... When I thought it might come to blows, however, I eventually backed down.

Text[0]: Never did I imagine I would embark upon a journey beyond the dome. I owe this opportunity to you.
Text[1]: The opportunity to take joy in these festivities, collect eggs with my sisters, exchange trinkets for prizes... I should take something back with me, to remember this time by.

Text[0]: Well, if this festival isn't just the most darling little event I've ever seen!
Text[1]: I would have brought my broadcasting equipment had I known! Eggs, sunglasses...which of these adorable accoutrements would go well with my costume, do you think?

Text[0]: I'm egg-static that my delightful darlings have been represented in these spectacles! I myself am sporting a pair as we speak. Beneath my festive guise, of course.
They say you were the one who recovered our precious eggs! It would have been a dark Hatching-tide indeed had those vile leafkin destroyed the work of so many charming chickens.
Text[1]: Speaking of which...
Text[2]: I'm egg-static that my delightful darlings have been represented in these spectacles! I myself am sporting a pair as we speak. Beneath my festive guise, of course.

Text[0]: Hmhmhm... I eagerly await the advent of tonberry spectacles. The realm may not yet be ready for their splendor, but in time, all shall come to realize the glory that is tonberry! <heavy breathing>

Good <If(LessThan(PlayerParameter(11),12))><If(LessThan(PlayerParameter(11),4))>evening<Else/>morning</If><Else/><If(LessThan(PlayerParameter(11),17))>day<Else/>evening</If></If>, <If(PlayerParameter(4))>milady<Else/>fine sir</If>! I hear you are to thank for the weeding that has allowed this humble enthusiast to collect his eggs in peace and safety. <snort>
Text[1]: The prizes I found to be acceptable...however, I eagerly await the advent of tonberry spectacles. The realm may not yet be ready for their splendor, but in time, all shall come to realize the glory that is tonberry! <heavy breathing>

Text[0]: Have you met these fine fellows, Masters Pawlin and Hamlyn? One a lover of chickens, one a worshipper of tonberries─both spirits kindred in their devotion!
Text[1]: Speaking of passion, how does the egg hunting arena fare? If you venture out for another trim, Herberin the Perfervid would be honored to accompany you!
